inherited_bottom_sections.interpretation_limit: These are nominal STEP face sections, not a global minimum-thickness proof.

provisional_print_guidance_not_design_fa: Do not scale the whole model to compensate shrinkage; calibrate XY holes and Z separately with the actual process.
Treat the glass as a no-press-fit part; use a compliant gasket and process-specific clearance coupon.
For FDM, confirm every retained wall has enough slicer perimeters; the 1.00 mm retainer is specifically unresolved.
Do not derive a screw pilot diameter from the nominal M3 label; use the selected screw/insert supplier rule plus a printed coupon.

risks.finding: Sharp p.23 resolves the screen-local 6-o'clock exit, rear flat-contact face, Pin 1 side and allowed rear fold; enclosure +Y/-Y rotation, adapter mapping, exact connector latch and folded route remain unknown.
risks.evidence: two datasheet-backed enclosure rotations present; selection_frozen=false; routing_frozen=false
risks.release_gate: Photograph the real display/adapter, continuity-check all ten adapter pins, choose enclosure rotation, then validate connector latch and folded route in a closed enclosure.

risks.finding: The 0.40 mm gasket is a geometric proxy; compression, adhesive creep and glass stress are untested.
risks.release_gate: Choose actual gasket material from supplier data and pass repeated close/open plus powered display inspection without pressure artefacts or glass damage.

risks.finding: The 1.00 mm retainer has no fastener or snap geometry and is thinner than the inherited 1.60 mm nominal floor section.
risks.evidence: generated retainer thickness=1.00 mm; inherited floor section=1.60 mm
risks.release_gate: Select material/process, add fastening, print and pass flex/retention testing.

risks.finding: Inherited exact Ø3.0 mm bores may print undersize; screw type and pilot-hole rule are not selected.
risks.evidence: four Ø3.0 bores and Ø7.0 bosses found in bottom STEP
risks.release_gate: Print a hole/boss coupon, select screw/inserts and record final compensated bore; inspect bosses after three assembly cycles.

risks.finding: Nominal inherited sections are 1.60 mm floor and 2.00 mm boss radial wall, but local global minimum and print anisotropy are not proven.
risks.release_gate: Run slicer thin-wall preview for the chosen nozzle/resin and physically inspect all walls/bosses; thicken only derived enclosure if needed.

risks.finding: Button bodies, keycaps, EC12 body/shaft and press travel remain proxies.
risks.release_gate: Measure the purchased EC12 and switches with calipers; validate axial press at full travel and rotation in a 1:1 print.

risks.finding: Power/Lock placements clear current proxies but switch body, cap travel and accidental-press force are unverified.
risks.release_gate: Select the real switch and pass reach, guard, full-travel and closed-shell tests.

risks.finding: PCB components, solder joints, battery, speaker, connector latch and wiring are not included in a closed-shell Z-stack.
risks.evidence: current assembly contains front, gasket, screen and retainer only
risks.release_gate: Build a complete component-envelope assembly and pass closed-shell collision/clearance audit.

risks.finding: Shrinkage, hole compensation, support scars and warping depend on the chosen printer/material/orientation.
risks.release_gate: Print a dimensional coupon and one sacrificial fit shell; record measured compensation before final STL export.

limits: No real assembly evidence is created by this audit.
Nominal STEP sections are not a proof of global minimum wall thickness.
No FPC direction/contact side/Pin 1, connector rotation, input placement or power-button placement is selected.
